completed.title: Configurable scanner rule packs
completed.summary: Added validated project-specific rule-pack configuration while keeping core credential and secret protections mandatory.

completed.title: Exact-fingerprint baseline gate
completed.summary: Added integrity-checked, control-bound baselines and a new-findings-only CI mode for safe adoption in repositories with legacy findings.

completed.title: Git-aware changed-file gate
completed.summary: Added merge-base changed-file scanning with safe Git ref resolution, NUL-delimited path parsing, repository-bound path validation, and baseline classification limited to the changed scope.

completed.title: Added-line-only security gate
completed.summary: Added zero-context old/new hunk scopes and a low-noise gate that reports only findings starting on added or replaced lines while resolving baselines only through old changed lines.

completed.title: First-party GitHub Action
completed.summary: Added a read-only composite action with full, changed-file, and added-line modes, immutable pull-request event refs, workspace-contained controls, generated-output confinement, preview-free annotations and summaries, JSON/SARIF reports, and structured outputs.

completed.title: Installable dependency-free Python package
completed.summary: Added canonical versioning, reviewed wheel metadata, four installed console commands, exact wheel-content validation, isolated installation tests, and a fail-closed boundary for source-only integrations.

completed.title: Reproducible release evidence
completed.summary: Added deterministic release bundles, canonical source identity, byte-for-byte wheel comparison, SHA-256 checksums, manifest integrity verification, and a read-only non-publishing release-readiness workflow.

completed.title: Deterministic SBOM and provenance evidence
completed.summary: Added per-wheel SPDX 2.3 JSON SBOMs, unsigned in-toto/SLSA-style provenance, manifest-bound evidence digests, semantic evidence regeneration, and read-only supply-chain validation in release CI.

completed.title: Consumer release-admission policy
completed.summary: Added a versioned offline consumer policy gate that verifies a release bundle first, then admits or denies it using exact source identity, artifact, module, command, dependency, license, checksum, SBOM, provenance, and unsigned-evidence constraints.

completed.title: Verified release transition and rollback gate
completed.summary: Added deterministic comparison of two fully verified release bundles, caller-pinned trusted and candidate identities, rollback/replay/same-version-mutation detection, module and interface change analysis, and a read-only transition decision workflow.

completed.title: Pinned tamper-evident release trust state
completed.summary: Added a consumer-owned canonical hash-chain state with externally retained state IDs, exact anchor and bundle-head binding, accepted-transition recording, duplicate-release prevention, lock-coordinated atomic updates, and stale/fork/tamper rejection.

completed.title: Portable Merkle release checkpoints
completed.summary: Added canonical unsigned Merkle checkpoints, externally pinned checkpoint IDs, portable release inclusion proofs, immutable atomic proof artifacts, and rollback/fork lineage gates for consumer trust-state distribution and recovery.

completed.title: Compact Merkle consistency proofs
completed.summary: Added portable append-only consistency proofs between externally pinned checkpoints using canonical compact hash frontiers, proof-only verification, immutable artifacts, and explicit rollback/fork denials.

completed.title: Strict tamper-evident audit logs
completed.summary: Added strict canonical audit schemas, full-chain append preflight, stable AUDxxx diagnostics, external freshness pins, lock-coordinated appends, immutable verified-prefix recovery, and corrupt-log command blocking.

completed.title: Typed privacy-safe audit events
completed.summary: Added versioned exact schemas for reserved audit events, bounded generic events, privacy-preserving path/command/Git-ref references, typed coverage and event-count reporting, and explicit typed-only migration enforcement.

completed.title: Atomic audit segment rotation
completed.summary: Added lock-coordinated rotation of fully typed audit logs into canonical sealed directories, atomic linked active-log replacement, complete archived-chain verification, and externally pinned latest-segment rollback protection.

completed.title: Canonical audit segment catalog
completed.summary: Added canonical catalogs that auto-discover sealed segment directories, bind exact archive evidence, require externally pinned catalog IDs, track predecessor-linked generations, detect incomplete histories, and synchronize only right-descendant segments.

completed.title: Portable audit catalog Merkle checkpoints
completed.summary: Added canonical Merkle checkpoints for pinned audit catalogs, compact per-segment inclusion proofs, proof-only verification, optional sealed-segment binding, immutable artifacts, and stable AUP diagnostics.

completed.title: Compact audit catalog consistency proofs
completed.summary: Added compact append-only consistency proofs between externally pinned audit catalog checkpoints with canonical hash frontiers, proof-only root reconstruction, direct predecessor and generation controls, and explicit rollback/fork/regression denials.

completed.title: Portable audit evidence bundles
completed.summary: Added portable snapshot and transition bundles that verify and package pinned audit checkpoints, inclusion proofs, optional consistency proofs, and optional sealed segments behind canonical manifests, exact file boundaries, checksums, immutable output, and stable AUB diagnostics.

completed.title: Consumer audit bundle admission policy
completed.summary: Added a consumer-owned policy gate that fully verifies portable audit bundles before authorizing bundle type, evidence size, proof and sealed-segment coverage, candidate catalog bounds, selected segment identities, and transition continuity requirements.

completed.title: Pinned audit bundle trust state
completed.summary: Added a consumer-owned canonical hash-chain state that initializes from admitted snapshot bundles and advances only through admitted transition bundles whose previous checkpoint and catalog match the current pinned head.
